Live hiking dashboard: climb-left, ETA and measured pace

nodes.label: iPhone PWA Install & Offline Caching
nodes.rationale: Visit once with internet so the service worker caches everything for offline use, because the Oia cliffs stretch has no signal.

nodes.label: Supabase Shared Sync Setup (camino_shared / camino_journal)
nodes.rationale: Deliberately open RLS policy (for all using true): anyone with both the app URL and the anon key could write, but for a two-person trip app this trade-off is accepted; mitigation is keeping the app URL private.

nodes.label: config.js Credential Separation Convention
nodes.rationale: SUPA_URL/SUPA_KEY live in config.js, which app updates never touch: when a new version arrives only index.html and sw.js are replaced, so credentials survive upgrades.

nodes.label: Surgical GPS / Bundled GPX Track Setup
nodes.rationale: Easy way (recommended): drop track.gpx or track1..N.gpx next to index.html and redeploy; both phones pick the track up automatically on next open, and stage files are stitched in walking order. Manual way loads per phone via the Files app.
nodes.norm_label: surgical gps / bundled gpx track setup

nodes.label: Fixed Trip Facts (flight, base, boots-on, return train)

nodes.label: Yellow Arrow (Camino de Santiago Waymark Motif)
nodes.norm_label: yellow arrow (camino de santiago waymark motif)

nodes.label: Ten-Year Anniversary Arrival (Oct 8, 2026)
nodes.rationale: The classic seven stages land in Vigo on 2026-10-08, exactly ten years after Miami, October 2016 ('May I kiss you'). The itinerary is anchored to that date: the plan picker warns if a custom plan arrives later than Oct 8, and the stage falling on ANNIV=2026-10-08 gets special anniversary styling.

nodes.label: Miño Boat Crossing (Caminha → A Guarda)
nodes.rationale: No bridge over the Miño; the water taxi (Xacobeo Transfer / Taxi Mar Caminha, 6-8 EUR) is the one reservation that can strand the trip. October runs a reduced, tide-dependent schedule, so book 2-3 days ahead and confirm the evening before. Plan B: train to Valença and cross the bridge to Tui. Landing at Camposancos means Spain and clocks jump one hour forward.

nodes.label: Costa Brava Packing/Budget/Expenses/Journal System (reused)
nodes.rationale: The packing, budget, expenses and journal UI components were carried over from a previous 'Costa Brava' trip-app system rather than built fresh, per the CSS section comment.
